name: Budget tracking & threshold status
description: Add planned-vs-actual budget tracking and threshold status. Backend: GET /api/v1/budgets/:id/status (returns planned amount, actual spend to date, remaining, percent used, and threshold status: ok|warning|exceeded for both total and per-category budgets keyed by the global category catalog). Actual spend is computed from the expense aggregate for the budget period, filtered by household and visibility. Frontend: Budget Tracking page — progress bars per category (green/amber/red by threshold), remaining amount, and an inline warning banner when total budget is ≥ 80% consumed or exceeded. Thresholds: warning at 80%, exceeded at 100%. Category labels/icon/color resolve from the static catalog by key. Per docs/product-specs/budget-management.md. Does NOT include push/email notifications (post-MVP per budget-notification.md).
evidence: Added GET /api/v1/budgets/:id/status with household-visible planned-vs-actual aggregation and threshold states (ok|warning|exceeded) for configured budget categories only. Updated the budgets page to default to the latest budget month, fetch status separately, and render tracking UI with category metadata resolved from the static catalog. Verified with pnpm --filter worker test -- budgets-status.spec.ts, pnpm --filter web test -- apps/web/src/components/budget/budget-status-panel.test.tsx apps/web/src/components/budget/budget-status-card.test.tsx apps/web/src/views/app/budgets-page.test.tsx, pnpm --filter web typecheck, and ./init.sh.
